questionHtml: Predict, with a reason, the effect on the equilibrium constant, Kc, when the temperature is increased.
markschemeHtml:
«Kc» decreases AND reaction is exothermic

OR

«Kc» decreases AND ΔH is negative

OR

«Kc» decreases AND reverse/endothermic reaction is favoured

 

[1 mark]

meta.title: Predict, with a reason, the effect on the equilibrium constant, Kc, when the temperature is increased.
